creator: arnout@xs4all.nl
text:
Submitter-Id:   current-users
 Originator:     Arnout Boer 
 Confidential:   no
 Synopsis:       Include IPFILTER_DEFAULT_BLOCK and rc.network additions for ipfilter in stable
 Severity:       non-critical
 Priority:       medium
 Category:       kern
 Release:        FreeBSD 4.1-STABLE i386
 Class:          wish
 Environment: 
         FreeBSD 4.1-STABLE
 
 Description: 
 
 	Please import the default to block IPF commits asap from
          current to stable. Additions for IPFILTER/IPNAT/IPMON
          for rc.network and rc.conf would also be greatly
          appreciated by a lot op people.
 
 How-To-Repeat: 
 
 	Not applicable
 
 Fix: 
 
 	Commit current changes to stable and the rc.network
          and rc.conf also
